fault_hypothesis: The function incorrectly removes the last element from the merged list on line 67. This happens when both input lists share the same final element, violating the expectation that a merge operation preserves all elements.

constraints.intent: The length of the merged list should not be altered after the main merge logic.

spec.expr: not (merged__1 and left and right and merged__1[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])

constraints.intent: The special-case logic to remove a supposed duplicate should never be triggered.
After the main merge logic completes, the merged list must contain all elements from both inputs.
The final returned list must contain all elements from both inputs.
